node.text:
To boost AI research, we helped create MineDojo. It utilizes the almost infinite number of open-ended tasks and actions in Minecraft to train #AI agents. And for the gamers who love that world, @Minecraft with RTX lights it up like never before.

Learn more about our work in our #NVIDIAstory highlight.

node.text:
@Amazon, @BMW, @EricssonNA, @Siemens, @loweshomeimprovement, and others use @NVIDIAOmniverse to plan and simulate operations, saving millions of dollars. NVIDIA-powered simulations are also helping @NASA plan the landing of its first manned mission to Mars.

Visit the link in our #NVIDIAstory highlight to learn more about us.

node.text:
Alpamayo 1 is now Hugging Face’s top-downloaded robotics model with 100K downloads and counting. 🎉 

It helps researchers and autonomous-driving practitioners develop and evaluate vision-language-action models for complex autonomous-driving scenarios, especially rare long-tail events.

🔗 Get started with Alpamayo 1 at the link in our bio.

node.text:
What’s next in robotics starts with physical AI. 🤖 

By combining decades of machine data with AI, simulation, and digital twins, leaders like @agibot_, @frankarobotics, @caterpillarinc, and PlusAI are scaling intelligent machines across industries and redefining what robots can do in the physical world.

Full video in bio. 👆

node.text:
@Meta is deploying AI at scale through deep codesign across the full NVIDIA platform. This expanded partnership will enable the large-scale deployment of NVIDIA CPUs, millions of NVIDIA Blackwell, Rubin GPUs, and NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet networking to drive peak efficiency for the next frontier of AI.

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

node.text:
Sometimes engineering changes more than technology — it changes lives. 💙

Jensen Huang reflects on meeting his wife in the “EE Fundies” lab at @oregonstate University, where shared problem-solving became the foundation of a lifelong partnership.

Fun fact: they were also part of the OSU IEEE-Eta Kappa Nu Pi Chapter.

#IEEEMedalofHonor #ValentinesDay #Innovation #EngineeringExcellence

node.text:
💡 Leading inference providers — Baseten, DeepInfra, Fireworks AI, and Together AI — are cutting cost per token by up to 10x across industries with optimized inference stacks powered by the NVIDIA Blackwell platform.

By combining #opensource frontier intelligence with NVIDIA Blackwell’s hardware–software codesign, and their own optimized inference stacks, these providers are delivering dramatic token cost reduction for businesses including Sully.ai, Latitude, Sentient, and Decagon.

Visit the link in bio to learn more.

node.text:
Did you know there’s an NVIDIA DGX Spark powering AI research at the South Pole? ❄️

At the University of Wisconsin–Madison’s IceCube Neutrino Observatory in Antarctica, researchers are using DGX Spark to run AI models that help study the universe’s most cataclysmic events—through subatomic particles called neutrinos.

The NVIDIA DGX Spark desktop supercomputer brings data‑center‑class AI performance to lab benches, faculty offices, and student systems worldwide, and fuels groundbreaking AI research at universities including ASU, Harvard, ISTA, Mississippi State, NYU, Stanford, and the University of Delaware.

📸 DGX Spark on a ceremonial South Pole marker. Image courtesy of Tim Bendfelt / NSF.

🔗 See our link-in-bio to read more.
